basic_details.post_name: Consultant - The Indian Journal of Social Work (IJSW)
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Consultant - The Indian Journal of Social Work (IJSW) post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate degree in Social Work or Social Sciences from a recognised university
qualification.details: A post-graduate degree in Social Work or Social Sciences from a recognised university (Essential). Minimum 10 years experience in academic publishing, journal management, editorial assistance, or copyediting (Desirable).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Consultant - The Indian Journal of Social Work (IJSW)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Consultant position is 10 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a post-graduate degree in Social Work or Social Sciences from a recognized university. Additionally, 10 years of experience in academic publishing, journal management, editorial assistance, or copyediting is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- Per Month for the Consultant position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial shortlisting of applications, followed by a personal interaction, which can be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the TISS located?
faq.answer: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations for this particular post. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my email application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
